name: Animal Welfare Board of India (AWBI)
address: 42 KM Stone, Delhi-Agra Highway, NH-2, Village-Seekri, Ballabhgarh, Faridabad, Haryana 121004
summary: National animal welfare board contact and escalation point.
notes: Useful for escalation, policy, and official contact. Not a field ambulance dispatch line.

name: AWBI Grievance / Complaint
address: Online and phone support via AWBI
summary: Official complaint and grievance channel for animal welfare issues.
notes: Use for written complaints, escalation, and follow-up. Not a rescue ambulance.

name: AWBI-Recognized Organizations Directory
summary: Directory of AWBI-recognized animal welfare organizations across India.
notes: Best official starting point when you need a recognized local organization in a city not listed here.

name: India Emergency Response Support System
summary: Use when a person is in danger or the rescue scene is unsafe.
notes: Human safety first: traffic danger, fire, violence, or other immediate public-safety emergencies.

name: BSPCA / Bai Sakarbai Dinshaw Petit Hospital for Animals
address: Dr. S. S. Rao Road, Parel, Mumbai 400012
hours: Hospital enquiries 24x7; see website for department-specific lines
summary: Hospital and treatment contact for animals in Mumbai.
notes: BSPCA says the hospital serves emergency cases 24x7. Ambulance timing and ABC contacts are listed separately on the site.

name: Friendicoes SECA
address: 271 & 273 Defence Colony Flyover Market, Jungpura Side, New Delhi 110024
summary: Rescue, ambulance, and rehabilitation support in Delhi NCR.
notes: Friendicoes says its night clinic and night ambulance service are currently suspended.

name: Jaagruti
summary: Animal first-aid and rights guidance with limited regional service work.
notes: Jaagruti states on its site that it is not a rescue service, hospital, or ambulance.

name: RESQ Charitable Trust
address: Plot No. 3906, Paud Mulshi Road, Bavdhan, Pune 411021
hours: Office 11:00 AM - 5:00 PM; see site for specialized helplines
summary: Rescue and rehabilitation support with clear published service limits.
notes: RESQ says its 24x7 helplines are for wildlife emergencies and large domestic animals; technical rescues may still be supported depending on the case.

name: Animal Aid Unlimited
address: Badi Village, Liyo Ka Gurha, near Badi TB Hospital, Udaipur, Rajasthan 313011
hours: Rescue support for reported local cases; see site for full instructions
summary: Street-animal rescue and hospital care in Udaipur.
notes: Animal Aid asks callers to stay with the animal if possible and says this helpline is for Udaipur-area street animals.

name: Blue Cross of India Rescue Form
address: Blue Cross Avenue, No. 72, Velachery Road, Guindy, Chennai
summary: Online rescue request form for distressed street animals in Greater Chennai.
notes: Blue Cross says the form is only for Greater Chennai Corporation limits and mainly within about 10 km of Guindy.

name: Greater Chennai Street Animal ABC Helpline
summary: Street-animal ABC / birth-control contact noted on Blue Cross of India’s official rescue page.
notes: Blue Cross directs street-animal ABC requests within corporation limits to helpline 1913.

name: CUPA — Compassion Unlimited Plus Action
address: KVAFSU Veterinary College Campus, Bellary Road, Hebbal, Bengaluru 560024
summary: Trauma and rescue centre for injured street animals in Bengaluru.
notes: CUPA runs the main street-animal trauma and rescue centre in Bengaluru. Helpline active 9am–5pm daily.

name: People For Animals — Hyderabad
address: 14-7-95, Opp. Goodwill School, Near Muslim Jung Pul, Begum Bazar, Hyderabad 500012
summary: 24-hour animal rescue and emergency response for Hyderabad.
notes: PFA Hyderabad states its rescue helpline (Mr. Javed) is available 24 hours. They request callers describe the animal's condition and share a photo.

name: Help in Suffering
summary: One of India's most respected animal welfare hospitals, serving Jaipur and surrounding areas.
notes: Help in Suffering is a well-established animal hospital in Jaipur. Call ahead to confirm emergency availability.

name: Love N Care For Animals
summary: Animal rescue and care service for Kolkata.
notes: For Kolkata, also see AWBI directory for additional recognized organizations in the city.

name: ASPCA Poison Control
service_area: Primarily US / international callers should verify access

name: Pet Poison Helpline
notes: Consultation fee may apply. Useful when local toxicology support is unavailable.
